differentials.name: Passage of stone
differentials.raw: Passage of stone (return to normal after days to weeks)

differentials.name: Common bile duct surgery
differentials.raw: Common bile duct surgery (return to normal in 30-50 days)

differentials.name: Normal variant (aging) Fatty-meal sonography (to differentiate from obstruction with 74% sensitivity, 100% specificity) Method:   peroral Lipomul® (1.5 mL/kg) followed by 100 mL of water [cholecystokinin
differentials.raw: Normal variant (aging) Fatty-meal sonography (to differentiate from obstruction with 74% sensitivity, 100% specificity) Method:   peroral Lipomul® (1.5 mL/kg) followed by 100 mL of water [cholecystokinin

context: causes contraction of gallbladder, relaxation of sphincter of Oddi, increase in bile secretion], CBD measured before and 45 / 60 min after stimulation √  little change / decrease in size = normal response √  increase in size > 2 mm = partial obstruction
